title: Senior Doctor - Merck India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Merck India Ventures Solutions - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Merck India Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Merck India Ventures Solutions:
Merck India Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Merck India Ventures Solutions!
